faqs.question: Can I change plans at any time?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your subscription at any time from your dashboard. The change takes effect immediately.

faqs.question: Is there a commitment period?
faqs.answer: No commitment at all! All our subscriptions are monthly with no commitment. You are free to cancel at any time.

faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer: Voce pode cancelar sua assinatura a qualquer momento pelo seu perfil. O cancelamento entra em vigor no final do periodo atual. Sem compromisso de longo prazo.

faqs.question: Do prices include VAT?
faqs.answer: Yes, all displayed prices include VAT. No additional charges will be added at checkout.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) through our secure partner Stripe.

faqs.question: Can I try before committing?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our free plan lets you discover HuntZen without a credit card. No card required to get started.

about.hero_title: HuntZen Jobs: Your Career Ally in France
about.hero_subtitle: Discover how HuntZen Jobs is revolutionizing job searching in France with the power of AI and a candidate-centered approach.
about.who_p1: HuntZen Jobs is the next-generation job search platform that transforms the way candidates find their next job in France. HuntZen combines cutting-edge technology, artificial intelligence and HR expertise to deliver an unrivaled job search experience.
about.who_p2: Founded in 2024, HuntZen Jobs was born from a simple vision: to make job searching more efficient, more human, and more accessible to all. With HuntZen, we believe every candidate deserves the best opportunities and the most powerful tools to succeed in their career.
about.who_p3: Today, HuntZen Jobs aggregates thousands of job listings in France, covering all sectors, all experience levels and all contract types. The HuntZen platform analyzes thousands of listings daily from the largest job sites to offer you a comprehensive catalog on the French market.
about.why_subtitle: HuntZen Jobs offers you much more than a simple list of job listings. Discover our 3 pillars that make HuntZen your best career ally.
about.feature1_desc: HuntZen Jobs aggregates thousands of job listings in France from the largest platforms: Indeed, LinkedIn, Pôle Emploi, APEC and many others. With HuntZen, you access all opportunities in one place.
about.feature2_desc: Our HuntZen technology analyzes your CV in depth and gives you a precise ATS score. The HuntZen Jobs CV analysis tool identifies weaknesses and provides concrete recommendations to improve your chances of landing an interview.
about.feature3_desc: The HuntZen career assistant guides you at every step: interview preparation, salary negotiation, LinkedIn optimization. With HuntZen Jobs, you have a professional coach available 24/7.
about.story_p1: Founded in 2024, HuntZen Jobs is revolutionizing the job search market in France. The HuntZen team identified a major problem: candidates waste hours browsing multiple job sites, optimizing their CV without guidance, and preparing for interviews alone.
about.story_p2: The vision of HuntZen Jobs? Centralize all job listings, provide professional analysis tools and offer personalized support through artificial intelligence. Within a few months, HuntZen became the reference for thousands of candidates in France.
about.story_p3: Today, HuntZen Jobs has over 50,000 active users who use the platform daily to find their next job. The HuntZen community grows every day, and our mission remains the same: to make job searching more efficient and more human.
about.vs_subtitle: Discover why HuntZen Jobs outperforms Indeed, LinkedIn and others
about.vs_item1_desc: HuntZen centralizes ALL listings (Indeed, LinkedIn, Pôle Emploi...)
about.vs_item2_desc: Precise ATS score included - paid on other platforms
about.vs_item4_desc: Intuitive and fast UX - far superior to others
about.vs_item5_desc: AI recommendations based on your complete profile
about.cta_subtitle: Transform your job search with HuntZen. HuntZen Jobs is 100% free and commitment-free.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: The rules governing the use of our platform and services.

whoWeAre.title: About us
whoWeAre.intro: We are HUNTZEN, Unipessoal Lda., a Portuguese limited company (Sociedade Unipessoal por Quotas) with a share capital of 15,000.00 euros, registered at Rua dos Lusíadas 5 5b, 1300-365 Lisbon, Portugal, with tax identification number 516481320 (hereinafter "HUNTZEN", "we", "our") and these are the General Terms and Conditions of Sale and Use (GTCSU) of HUNTZEN.
whoWeAre.thanks: Thank you for taking a few minutes to read our GTCSU for the Website https://huntzenjobs.com (hereinafter the "Website"), published by HUNTZEN.
whoWeAre.important: These GTCSU contain important information for you as a user of our Website and purchaser of our services, and apply to all services used or purchased on our Website.
whoWeAre.contactIntro: If you have any questions about these GTCSU, you can contact us by mail at Rua dos Lusíadas 5 5b, 1300-365 Lisbon, Portugal, by email at contact@huntzenjobs.com or by phone:

applicability.title: Applicability of the GTCSU
applicability.content1: The use of this Website, any related subdomains and all related services, products, offers and services, are expressly subject to your acceptance of these GTCSU. By using our Website or taking advantage of any of our services, the User ("Client", "Recruiter" or "Candidate") automatically accepts and complies with, without reservation or exception, these GTCSU, including future modifications announced by publication on our Website or otherwise notified.
applicability.content2: HUNTZEN reserves the right to modify the GTCSU at any time and without notice. The modified GTCSU shall apply as soon as they are made accessible, without any further formality being required.
applicability.warning: If the User does not approve or disagree with these GTCSU, they may not use or access the Website, or make use of HUNTZEN's services.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.content1: All content published on the Website (including logos, trademarks, copyrights, etc.) is the exclusive intellectual property of HUNTZEN and, without the express authorization of HUNTZEN, may not be distributed, modified or used in any way.
intellectualProperty.content2: Any reproduction, distribution, commercialization or transformation of content that has not been expressly authorized by its owners constitutes a violation of intellectual and industrial property rights protected by law and may give rise to administrative, civil or criminal proceedings in the event of a violation of such rights.
intellectualProperty.content3: Access to and use of the Website and services does not transfer any ownership whatsoever.

siteContent.title: Website content
siteContent.content1: On the Website, the User has the option to subscribe to HUNTZEN's Services. The User can access a description of the essential features of the services based on their profile (Client, Recruiter, Candidate) and the concept behind their development.
siteContent.content2: These services are available in Portuguese, French and English.

userProfiles.title: User Profiles
userProfiles.intro: The use of the Website and services differ depending on the User's profile:
userProfiles.clientDesc: Any private or public legal entity, registered on the Website, posting a job advertisement to receive applications from Recruiter or Candidate accounts.
userProfiles.recruiterDesc: Any natural or legal person, registered on the Website, recruitment professional, wishing to present Candidates to Companies that have posted a Job on the Website. Only persons with either recruitment experience or recruitment training may be Recruiters (and therefore claim the Bonus).
userProfiles.candidateDesc: Any natural person who has been recommended by a Recruiter and has agreed to be potentially contacted by the Client.

servicesDescription.title: Service Description
servicesDescription.clientDesc: HUNTZEN allows, through its Website, the Client to register, publish offers, modify them and communicate with Recruiters via a dedicated platform, and organize their recruitments.
servicesDescription.recruiterDesc: HUNTZEN allows, through its Website, the Recruiter to register, process CVs received and send CVs matching offers posted by Clients. In addition, Recruiters may receive bonuses when they have participated in a Client's recruitment.
servicesDescription.candidateDesc: HUNTZEN allows, through its Website, the Candidate to register, submit a CV and organize through the dedicated platform, and receive bonuses if the submitted CV leads to a recruitment within 6 months.

serviceAccess.title: Access to the Service
serviceAccess.content1: HUNTZEN endeavours to provide access to the site 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, except in cases of force majeure or events beyond its control, and subject to possible breakdowns and maintenance necessary for the proper functioning of the Website and services.
serviceAccess.content2: Consequently, HUNTZEN cannot guarantee the availability of the site and/or services, the reliability of transmissions and performance in terms of response time or quality.
serviceAccess.content3: HUNTZEN shall not be held liable in the event of inability to access the site and/or use of the services.

registration.title: Registration
registration.content1: Any legal entity or public body, duly represented, as well as any natural person who is of legal age and has legal capacity, is authorized to register on the Website. Registration is essential to access the Service.
registration.content2: Upon completion of registration, a username (i.e. email address or first and last name) and password must be chosen by the Client, Recruiter and/or Candidate. The username and password are entirely confidential and personal and must never be disclosed to third parties.
registration.warning: The Client, Recruiter and/or Candidate guarantee that the information provided at the time of registration is accurate and corresponds to reality.
registration.content3: For security and data protection purposes, HUNTZEN will delete accounts of Clients, Recruiters and/or Candidates that are inactive, or without credit or debit, for a period of one year.

pricingSection.title: Pricing and payment terms
pricingSection.content1: All prices indicated by HUNTZEN on the Website and in other written documents issued by HUNTZEN are exclusive of VAT, which will be added at the legal rate on the date of issuance of the corresponding invoice. All invoices are payable in euros.
pricingSection.content2: HUNTZEN reserves the right to modify prices at any time without notice.
pricingSection.clientBullet1: Invoices must be paid according to the conditions set out in the contracts signed between HUNTZEN and the Client
pricingSection.clientBullet2: Payment must be made by bank transfer
pricingSection.recruiterBullet1: The Recruiter will receive 70% of what the Client has paid to HUNTZEN for the completed recruitment
pricingSection.recruiterBullet2: The recruitment of a Candidate whose CV was obtained via the HUNTZEN Website entitles a reduced bonus of 20%
pricingSection.recruiterBullet3: Payment will be made by bank transfer once the trial period has been validated
pricingSection.candidateBullet1: When a CV leads to a recruitment by a Client, HUNTZEN pays the Candidate 50% of what the Client paid
pricingSection.candidateBullet2: Payment will be made by bank transfer once the trial period has been validated

obligations.title: Obligations and responsibilities
obligations.huntzenContent1: HUNTZEN undertakes to use all necessary means to ensure the best possible provision of the Service.
obligations.huntzenContent2: In order to preserve the quality of the Website, HUNTZEN reserves the right to refuse a Client, an advertisement, a Recruiter or a Candidate at its sole discretion.
obligations.huntzenContent3: In the event of non-compliance with the GTCSU by a User, HUNTZEN may unilaterally and without delay terminate the registration of any Client, Recruiter or Candidate, by simple electronic notification.
obligations.clientBullet1: Obligation to notify HUNTZEN of interviews with Candidates with feedback
obligations.clientBullet2: Obligation to notify HUNTZEN of any completed recruitment
obligations.recruiterBullet1: Obligation to notify HUNTZEN when a Candidate has been recruited
obligations.recruiterBullet2: Obligation to send CVs with a report corresponding to the Client's search
obligations.candidateBullet1: Obligation to notify HUNTZEN when there has been a recruitment or interview
obligations.candidateBullet2: Obligation to send a CV that corresponds to the job description

liability.title: Exclusion of liability
liability.content1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, any liability of HUNTZEN or its affiliated companies is excluded in the event of loss or any other damage suffered by the User on the basis of or in connection with the conclusion of a service contract and use of the services offered on the HUNTZEN Website.
liability.content2: The Client, Recruiter or Candidate accepts that use of the services offered by HUNTZEN is at their own risk.
liability.warning: Delays, poor performance or total or partial non-performance of services in the event of force majeure cannot give rise to compensation.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable law and jurisdiction
applicableLaw.content1: The relationship between HUNTZEN and the User under these GTCSU is subject to Portuguese substantive law, unless the mandatory rules of the law of the User's country of residence apply.
applicableLaw.content2: In the event of difficulties in interpreting or performing the GTCSU, the User and HUNTZEN shall endeavour to settle their dispute amicably within thirty (30) calendar days.
applicableLaw.content3: Any judicial or arbitral dispute arising from the contractual relationship between HUNTZEN and the User under these GTCSU shall be submitted to the Portuguese courts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content1: The Website is operated by HUNTZEN, Unipessoal Lda., with registered office at Rua dos Lusíadas 5 5b, 1300-365 Lisbon, Portugal.
contact.content2: If you have any questions about the Website and its content, please contact our customer service:

footerLinks.tagline: A platform created by a recruiter and an entrepreneur.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is our priority. Find out how we protect and use your data.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy governs the processing of personal data of users (hereinafter "User" or "Users"), collected in the context of using the website https://huntzenjobs.com (hereinafter the "Website"), by HUNTZEN, Unipessoal Lda., a Portuguese limited company (Sociedade Unipessoal por Quotas) with a share capital of 15,000.00 euros, registered at Rua dos Lusíadas 5 5b, 1300-365 Lisbon, Portugal, with tax identification number 516481320 (hereinafter "HUNTZEN"), as the entity responsible for data processing.

dataCollection.title: Collection and processing of personal data
dataCollection.content1: Accessing and browsing the Website does not automatically require the User to provide personal data.
dataCollection.content2: However, the use of certain features of the Website requires the User to provide personal data. Indeed, Users' personal data is collected and processed in order to deliver the services offered.
dataCollection.content3: The collected data enables us to:
dataCollection.bullet1: Create and manage the user account
dataCollection.bullet2: Inform each stakeholder about a given recruitment
dataCollection.bullet3: Trigger invoicing for clients and invoice requests for consultants
dataCollection.bullet4: Provide support and assistance in their processes on the Website
dataCollection.bullet5: Answer any questions the User may have

userRights.title: User rights
userRights.content1: In accordance with applicable legislation, the User may request, at any time, access to their personal data as well as their rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability or object to their processing.
userRights.content2: The User may also obtain confirmation that their personal data is being processed, and may request a copy of the data being processed.
userRights.content3: The law also guarantees the User the right to withdraw consent to data processing for the stated purposes, without however invalidating the processing carried out up to that date based on previously given consent.
userRights.contactTitle: To exercise your rights, contact us:
userRights.contactAddress: Address: Rua dos Lusíadas 5 5b, 1300-365 Lisbon, Portugal

dataRetention.title: Retention of personal data
dataRetention.content1: Personal data collected is processed in accordance with applicable legislation.
dataRetention.content2: Personal data will be retained according to its purpose and in accordance with the retention period provided by applicable law. When there is no specific legal requirement, data will be stored and retained for an appropriate period and for the purposes for which it was collected, unless the User decides to exercise, within the limits of the law, the right to withdraw consent.

dataSharing.title: When is data shared with other entities?
dataSharing.bullet1: When using third parties to provide certain services, where the provision of these services may require access by such entities to personal data. Any subcontractor of HUNTZEN will process your personal data on behalf of HUNTZEN, under the strict obligation to follow its instructions and in accordance with the subcontracting agreement concluded with said subcontractors.
dataSharing.bullet2: To third parties, if it considers that such data transmissions are necessary or appropriate (i) under the law, (ii) by virtue of legal obligations/court orders, (iii) decisions of supervisory authorities or (iv) to respond to requests from public or governmental authorities.

security.title: Security
security.content1: HUNTZEN does everything in its power to protect Users' personal data from unauthorized access. To this end, it uses security systems, rules and other procedures to ensure the protection of personal data, as well as to prevent unauthorized access to data or its misuse, disclosure, loss or destruction.
security.content2: However, Users are responsible for ensuring that the devices and equipment used to access the Website are duly protected against malware, computer viruses and worms.

cookiesSection.title: Cookies
cookiesSection.whatIsContent: Cookies are small files or devices placed on Users' computers that allow the storage, retrieval, updating and processing of data relating to transactions carried out on the Website. These cookies are placed on Users' hard drives and not on the Website.
cookiesSection.firstVisit: On the first visit to the Website, Users are asked to accept or decline the use of certain categories of cookies.
cookiesSection.ownCookies: The Website uses HUNTZEN's own cookies and third-party cookies that allow anonymous usage analysis and measurement to ensure that the Website is functioning correctly and to improve our services.
cookiesSection.controlContent: If the User wishes to delete cookies that are already installed on their device, they can do so from their browser. To find out how to proceed, simply consult the browser's help section, where the steps to follow are provided.

internationalTransfers.title: International data transfers
internationalTransfers.content1: HUNTZEN may transfer personal data to third countries (outside the European Union or the European Economic Area), within the scope of the purposes set out in this policy, for which there is no adequacy decision by the European Commission.
internationalTransfers.content2: In this case, HUNTZEN undertakes to take appropriate security measures to ensure the confidentiality and protection of personal data, in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.
internationalTransfers.content3: The User may request information about these transfers by contacting contact@huntzenjobs.com.

complaints.title: Complaints
complaints.content1: Without prejudice to any other administrative or judicial remedy, the User has the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority in accordance with the law, when they consider that the processing of their data by HUNTZEN violates the applicable legal regime.

questions.title: Questions and suggestions
questions.content1: The User may contact HUNTZEN regarding any questions about the processing of their personal data and the exercise of the rights granted by applicable legislation:
questions.address: Address: Rua dos Lusíadas 5 5b, 1300-365 Lisbon, Portugal

policyChanges.title: Changes to the Privacy Policy
policyChanges.content1: HUNTZEN reserves the right to modify these data processing conditions at any time. Such modifications will take effect as soon as they are made available on the Website, without any further formality being required.

HUNTZEN, Unipessoal Lda. shall not be held liable for errors or omissions in published information, nor for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the website.

notFound.description: A página que procura não existe ou foi movida.

general.title: Empregos HuntZen - Geral
general.q1: O que é o HuntZen Jobs?
general.a1: A HuntZen Jobs é uma plataforma inovadora de apoio à procura de emprego em França. O HuntZen combina inteligência artificial, análise de currículo ATS e coaching personalizado para ajudá-lo a encontrar o emprego perfeito. Com milhares de anúncios de emprego atualizados diariamente, a HuntZen Jobs transforma a sua procura de emprego num verdadeiro sucesso.
general.a2: O HuntZen Jobs usa IA para combinar o seu perfil com as melhores ofertas de emprego. Envie o seu currículo para o HuntZen, o nosso algoritmo analisa o seu perfil e competências e, em seguida, oferece-lhe ofertas de emprego perfeitamente adaptadas. O HuntZen Jobs também otimiza seu currículo para os sistemas ATS dos recrutadores.
general.a3: Sim! A HuntZen Jobs oferece um plano gratuito com {freeCvLimit} análisesde currículo por dia e acesso a ofertas de emprego. Para desbloquear todos os recursos do HuntZen (análise ilimitada de currículos, coaching personalizado, alertas de trabalho personalizados), faça upgrade para o Plano HuntZen Jobs Pro por apenas {proPrice}.
general.q4: Por que escolher o HuntZen Jobs em vez do Indeed ou do LinkedIn?
general.a4: Ao contrário do Indeed ou do LinkedIn, o HuntZen Jobs oferece um coach personalizado, análise de currículo ATS profissional e correspondência inteligente. O HuntZen não lista apenas ofertas: acompanhamos você de A a Z. A maioria dos nossos usuários do HuntZen Jobs recebe mais respostas do que com o Indeed ou o LinkedIn.

cvAts.title: Análise CV e ATS
cvAts.q1: Como funciona a análise de CV do HuntZen Jobs?
cvAts.a1: O HuntZen Jobs CV Analysis analisa o seu currículo com a mesma tecnologia ATS que os recrutadores. O HuntZen detecta palavras-chave ausentes, erros de formatação e fornece uma pontuação ATS. Em seguida, o HuntZen fornece recomendações específicas para melhorar seu currículo e passar nos filtros ATS.
cvAts.q2: O que é uma pontuação ATS no HuntZen Jobs?
cvAts.a2: A pontuação ATS HuntZen Jobs mede a compatibilidade do seu currículo com os sistemas de classificação automática dos recrutadores. Uma pontuação de HuntZen acima de 80% garante que seu currículo seja lido por um humano. O HuntZen analisa formato, palavras-chave, estrutura e legibilidade para calcular essa pontuação.
cvAts.q3: Quantas análises de CV posso fazer com o HuntZen Jobs?
cvAts.a3: Com o plano gratuito HuntZen Jobs, você tem direito a {freeCvLimit} análisesde currículo por dia. Com o plano Pro HuntZen, as análises de CV são ilimitadas. O HuntZen Pro também permite comparar várias versões do seu currículo e acompanhar a sua pontuação ATS.
cvAts.q4: O HuntZen Jobs mantém meu currículo confidencial?
cvAts.a4: Com certeza! O HuntZen Jobs respeita a privacidade dos seus dados. O seu CV é armazenado de forma segura e encriptada. A HUNTZEN NUNCA partilha o seu currículo sem a sua permissão explícita. Você tem controle total sobre a visibilidade do seu perfil no HuntZen Jobs.

jobSearch.title: Procura de emprego:
jobSearch.q1: Quantas ofertas de emprego a HuntZen Jobs tem?
jobSearch.a1: A HuntZen Jobs agrega milhares de ofertas de emprego em França, atualizadas diariamente. O HuntZen compila ofertas de todas as principais plataformas (Indeed, LinkedIn, Welcome to the Jungle, etc.) e as filtra para oferecer apenas as mais relevantes de acordo com seu perfil.
jobSearch.q2: Como é que a HuntZen Jobs encontra os empregos certos para mim?
jobSearch.a2: O HuntZen Jobs usa um algoritmo de correspondência que analisa seu currículo, habilidades, experiência e preferências. Em seguida, a HuntZen compara esses dados com as ofertas de emprego disponíveis para oferecer as melhores oportunidades todos os dias. A correspondência HuntZen melhora à medida que avança.
jobSearch.q3: Posso candidatar-me diretamente através do HuntZen Jobs?
jobSearch.a3: O HuntZen Jobs redireciona-o para o site de anúncios de emprego para se candidatar diretamente. Para cada oferta no HuntZen, aceda ao link da candidatura original. Antes de se candidatar, o HuntZen ajuda-o a otimizar o seu currículo e a preparar a sua candidatura para maximizar as suas hipóteses.
jobSearch.q4: O HuntZen Jobs oferece alertas de emprego?
jobSearch.a4: Sim! Com o HuntZen Jobs Pro, recebe alertas de emprego personalizados por e-mail. A HuntZen notifica-o assim que uma nova oferta corresponder ao seu perfil. Defina os seus critérios (indústria, localização, salário) e deixe a HuntZen analisar novas ofertas para si.

assistant.title: Assistant Carrière
assistant.q1: Qu'est-ce que l'Assistant Carrière HuntZen Jobs ?
assistant.a1: L'Assistant Carrière HuntZen Jobs est un coach personnalisé accessible depuis votre tableau de bord. HuntZen vous aide à préparer vos entretiens, rédiger des lettres de motivation, optimiser votre CV, et construire votre stratégie de recherche d'emploi. C'est comme avoir un consultant carrière dédié sur HuntZen.
assistant.q2: Comment HuntZen Jobs m'aide à préparer mes entretiens ?
assistant.a2: HuntZen Jobs analyse l'offre d'emploi et votre profil pour générer des questions d'entretien personnalisées. HuntZen vous fournit aussi des réponses types, des conseils comportementaux, et des simulations d'entretien. Avec HuntZen, vous arrivez préparé(e) et confiant(e) en entretien.
assistant.q3: HuntZen Jobs peut-il rédiger ma lettre de motivation ?
assistant.a3: Oui ! HuntZen Jobs génère des lettres de motivation personnalisées en quelques secondes. Donnez à HuntZen l'offre d'emploi et votre CV : votre coach rédige une lettre professionnelle, convaincante et adaptée. Vous pouvez ensuite personnaliser le texte généré par HuntZen.

pricing.title: Tarifs & Abonnement
pricing.a1: HuntZen Jobs propose 2 plans : Gratuit (0€/mois) avec {freeCvLimit} analyse(s) CV/jour et accès aux offres, et Pro ({proPrice}) avec analyses CV illimitées, coach personnel, alertes emploi, et accompagnement personnalisé. Vous pouvez passer au plan Pro à tout moment depuis votre compte.
pricing.q2: Comment annuler mon abonnement HuntZen Jobs ?
pricing.a2: Vous pouvez annuler votre abonnement HuntZen Jobs à tout moment depuis votre compte. Allez dans Paramètres > Abonnement > Annuler. Aucun frais caché : avec HuntZen, vous payez uniquement jusqu'à la fin de votre période. Votre accès HuntZen Pro reste actif jusqu'à expiration.
pricing.q3: Como cancelo se o HuntZen Jobs nao me convem?
pricing.a3: Voce pode cancelar sua assinatura a qualquer momento pelo seu perfil. O cancelamento entra em vigor no final do periodo atual. Sem compromisso de longo prazo. Para qualquer duvida, entre em contato com nosso suporte em support@huntzenjobs.com.

support.title: Support & Aide
support.q1: Comment contacter le support HuntZen Jobs ?
support.a1: Le support HuntZen Jobs est disponible par email à support@huntzenjobs.com. Nos équipes HuntZen répondent en moins de 48h en semaine. Pour les utilisateurs Pro, HuntZen offre un support prioritaire.
support.q2: HuntZen Jobs propose-t-il des tutoriels vidéo ?
support.a2: HuntZen Jobs met à disposition des guides d'utilisation directement dans l'interface. Pour toute question, notre équipe support est disponible par email à support@huntzenjobs.com.
support.q3: Puis-je utiliser HuntZen Jobs sur mobile ?
support.a3: Oui ! HuntZen Jobs est 100% responsive et fonctionne parfaitement sur mobile et tablette via votre navigateur. Accédez à toutes les fonctionnalités depuis votre smartphone : recherche d'emploi, analyse de CV, et coaching personnalisé.

pageGate.title: Pagina nao disponivel
pageGate.description: Esta funcionalidade nao esta incluida no seu plano atual. Mude para um plano superior para aceder.
